Who won the 2018 Formula 1 championship?

[Tool Use]
- Called **query_f1_history_template**({"template_name": "driver_champions", "params": "{\"year\": 2018}"})

[Tool Results]
- **query_f1_history_template** returned: {"status": "success", "results": [{"driver": "Lewis Hamilton", "year": 2018, "constructor": "Mercedes", "points": 408.0, "wins": 11}], "row_count": 1}

🏆 The **2018** World Champion was **Lewis Hamilton**, driving for **Mercedes**, with **408.0 points** and **11 wins** in the season!

[Tool Results]
- **query_f1_history_template** returned: {"status": "success", "results": [{"position": 1, "driver": "Mark Webber", "constructor": "Red Bull", "points": 25.0, "laps": 71, "time": "1:32:17.464", "status": "Finished"}, {"position": 2, "driver": "Sebastian Vettel", "constructor": "Red Bull", "points": 18.0, "laps": 71, "time": "+16.983", "status": "Finished"}, {"position": 3, "driver": "Jenson Button", "constructor": "McLaren", "points": 15.0, "laps": 71, "time": "+27.638", "status": "Finished"}], "row_count": 10}

🏁 **GP do Brasil 2011**

🥇 **Mark Webber** (Red Bull)
🥈 **Sebastian Vettel** (Red Bull)
🥉 **Jenson Button** (McLaren)
